scripts.scout:eval: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .next/scout-tools --noEmit false src/tools/scout-eval.ts && node .next/scout-tools/tools/scout-eval.js
scripts.scout:eval:json: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .next/scout-tools --noEmit false src/tools/scout-eval.ts && node .next/scout-tools/tools/scout-eval.js --format json
scripts.scout:eval:report: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .next/scout-tools --noEmit false src/tools/scout-eval.ts && node .next/scout-tools/tools/scout-eval.js --format markdown --out .next/scout-eval-report.md
scripts.scout:mcp: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .next/scout-mcp --noEmit false src/mcp/server.ts && node .next/scout-mcp/mcp/server.js
scripts.scout:smoke: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --outDir .next/scout-mcp --noEmit false src/mcp/server.ts && node .next/scout-mcp/mcp/server.js --smoke
scripts.scout:qa: npm run scout:qa:eval-json && npm run scout:qa:mcp && npm run scout:qa:hygiene
scripts.scout:qa:eval-json: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --rootDir . --outDir .next/scout-qa --noEmit false scripts/qa-eval-json-shape.ts && node .next/scout-qa/scripts/qa-eval-json-shape.js
scripts.scout:qa:mcp: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --rootDir . --outDir .next/scout-mcp --noEmit false src/mcp/server.ts scripts/qa-mcp-tools.ts && node .next/scout-mcp/scripts/qa-mcp-tools.js
scripts.scout:qa:hygiene: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --rootDir . --outDir .next/scout-qa --noEmit false scripts/qa-hygiene.ts && node .next/scout-qa/scripts/qa-hygiene.js
